acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Evidence records the relevant workspace mutation baseline cluster for Hyprland model accessors.
Focused tests cover monitor description, scale, dpms_status, disabled, workspace monitor_id, has_fullscreen, and is_persistent behavior through parsed fixtures.
A targeted mutation check for crates/hyprland/src/model.rs passes.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: Orchestrator rerun: 70 mutants tested in 28s, 58 caught, 12 unviable, no missed mutants and no timeouts.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No transport, product QUIC, capture, encode, Apple, Nix, or supply-chain claim is changed.

realWorldValidation.evidence: This node hardens parsed Hyprland model accessor unit and mutation coverage only.
